title: William Uther
text: Home * People * William Uther William Uther [1] William T. B. Uther , an Australian computer scientist at NICTA and School of Computer Science and Engineering, University of New South Wales (UNSW) with research interests in Reinforcement Learning , Robot Soccer and Autonomous Driving . He defended his Ph.D in Computer Science at Carnegie Mellon University in 2002 [2] .
